purpose: Aggregated chemistry SFT bundle for next training pass. Includes manual verification (hand-reasoned), adapter invariants (contract tests), adapter verification (live computed values), and chemistry primary (transport_atomic reaction records).

pytest.command: python -m pytest tests/test_chemistry_adapter.py tests/test_chemistry_verification_gate.py tests/test_state9d_chemistry.py tests/test_state9d_chemistry_fusion.py tests/test_state9d_engine.py -q

datasets.name: chemistry_manual_verification_v1
datasets.description: College-level chemistry verification with full manual arithmetic reasoning paths.

datasets.name: chemistry_adapter_invariants_v1
datasets.description: Adapter invariant tests: error paths, real element mapping, threshold denial, batch ordering.

datasets.name: chemistry_adapter_verification_v1
datasets.description: Machine-verified adapter outputs: tau_hat, votes, valence_pressure, coherence_penalty, governance verdict from live SCBE pipeline.

datasets.name: chemistry_primary
datasets.description: Transport atomic reaction records: predict, stability, template, transport across 6 Sacred Tongues.

datasets.name: chemistry_manual_verification_v2
datasets.description: Expanded college-level chemistry verification (223 total rows) with auto-generated manual arithmetic reasoning paths.

next_actions: Expand adapter verification to 50-200 rows with isotopes, invalid rings, salts, organometallics
Train neural generator to replace rule-based validity (current 5-28% vs SOTA 95-100%)
Run chemistry bundle through next SFT pass alongside aligned_foundations_v2
